class.name: SolidBox
class.brief_description: Creates a box solid using OpenCASCADE.
class.description: [SolidBox] is the first 3D primitive wrapper in the extension. It builds an OCCT solid box positioned by a minimum-corner origin and size vector.

method.name: build_box
method.description: Builds the box with the given [param size] and optional minimum-corner [param origin].
